---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation that motivated
this request.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Additional context

Any other information, links, or screenshots that help explain the request.
